_doc: Data synthesis control — canonical/ is the single source of truth

GAME.notes: v10 FINAL: Only SFT-viable games. gin_rummy 1484 (bot vs random, proven 42% eval), goofspiel 480 (GPU bot vs random, 96% win), leduc_poker 296 (GPU bot vs MCTS 3000sim, 50% win). Zero-score games (liars_dice/othello/hex/clobber/gin_rummy) → GRPO. gin_rummy kept because existing vs random data already scores 42%.
GAME.audit: 2026-03-21: v10 final. GPU-verified goofspiel+leduc + preserved gin_rummy. Total 2260.

NAVWORLD.v5_fixes: transport format (Chinese text), Chinese prompts/schema, scorer keyword alignment
NAVWORLD.v5_quality: 625/625 pass validation (0 JSON errors, 0 missing fields, all have tool_calls, all plans >800 chars)
NAVWORLD.notes: V5 REGENERATION IN PROGRESS (39%). 4 parallel gen batches running (food_tour/family_study/multiday/hybrid +30 each). All V5 data quality-verified. Old canonical 951 entries to be fully replaced.
NAVWORLD.audit: 2026-03-21 loop2: V5 progress 281→625. Quality validated: Chinese prompts, Chinese transport format, proper tool schema. 4 gen batches active.

SWE-INFINITE.notes: REAL ONLY. 15 verified trajectories (Go 12, Ruby 2, Rust 1). HF synced. Batch running on m2 with local Docker build. Private pool 2500+ tasks.
SWE-INFINITE.audit: 2026-03-21: 15 entries canonical + HF. Migrated to m2 (Targon). Local Docker build fallback enabled.

LIVEWEB.notes: 464 entries. coingecko 317 (68%), stooq 68 (14%), hackernews 51 (10%), taostats 23 (4%), openlibrary 4. All OpenAI format, 0 errors. hybrid blocked by stooq API.
LIVEWEB.audit: 2026-03-21: 464 entries. XML→OpenAI fix applied. v2.7 eval=13.76. HF synced.
